notes: Lets Agents install or update a Skill, create its trigger group, and bind its exact project scope through DingDong MCP.
Synchronizes project-scoped Skills only into that project's native Agent skill directories.
Documents GitHub-link installation and the Prompt, Skill, and MCP activation differences for Agents.
Keeps clipboard number shortcuts aligned with the currently visible record range.
Retains signed one-click updates for macOS and per-user updates for Windows; Intel macOS and Windows remain beta.
